title: leucanthemum esterellense
intro: Leucanthemum esterellense, also known as the Esterel daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the French Riviera. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Leucanthemum esterellense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Leucanthemum esterellense are typically found in the form of tea, tinctures, or infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
